title: SMB3 - All 8 World Map Themes on Mario Paint Composer
description:
That's right! All 8 songs of the 8 world maps in Super Mario Bros. 3 for the NES (plus one bonus track). In order:

1 Grass Land
2 Koopahari Desert
3 Sea Side
4 Big Island 
5 The Sky 
6 Iced Land 
7 Pipe Maze 
8 Dark World 
9 Game Over (thought it would be a good way to end it)

Comment and enjoy!

EDIT: Looks likew I forgot The Sky: Part 2 and Warp Zone. Whoopsee...

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
